summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India activity concentrates in Colo (281 signals) and Build (18 signals) layers, with Power (9) and Compute (3) showing secondary presence. Top Indian states by entity presence: Tamil Nadu (Sify), Delhi (Nxtra, Oracle), Maharashtra (NTT, Tata, Reliance, AdaniConnex), Telangana (Yotta), Karnataka (Google). GCC movements with India relevance: Gulf Data Hub (UAE, Colo focus, 2 new signals) and Khazna (UAE, no India entity) are whitespace targets; NTT (India-active) shows momentum (+5.3 Δ, 3 new signals).

POLICY READ
India policy tailwinds: three regulation filings (Notice of Attachment of Bank Accounts and Demat Accounts) signal heightened financial compliance scrutiny — TAG can advise data-center operators on navigating asset attachment risks under AP Nos. 15504-15509 of 2026. No India legislation or analysis items present. GCC policy (Saudi Arabia’s 15 regulation items) does not directly push players toward India per data; treat as local market dynamics.

COMMERCIAL READ
India value-chain movement: Colo layer dominates (264 signals, led by Sify, Nxtra, CtrlS); Build layer shows 1 signal (AdaniConnex in Gujarat). Power layer has zero India signals — gap for TAG to advise on power solutions. GCC Power layer shows activity in Saudi Arabia (1) and Qatar (1), but no India linkage. Network and Cooling layers show zero signals across all markets.

RANKED INDIA OPPORTUNITIES
1. Gulf Data Hub (UAE; CIN not in data)  
   Why-now: 2 new signals, whitespace target (GCC active, no India entity)  
   Cross-signal: Active in UAE Colo (7 signals) with zero India presence → high likelihood of India entry  
   TAG play: India market-entry  
   Evidence: Whitespace list (Gulf Data Hub | UAE | score 28.5), Commercial layer (Colo: UAE=7)  

2. Khazna (UAE; CIN not in data)  
   Why-now: Δ+3.5, whitespace target (GCC active, no India entity)  
   Cross-signal: Active in UAE (GCC; UAE) with zero India entity → prime for India market-entry  
   TAG play: India market-entry  
   Evidence: Whitespace list (Khazna | GCC; UAE | score 32.6), TOP MOVERS (Khazna | Δ+3.5)  

3. CtrlS Datacenters Ltd (India; CIN U72900MH2000PTC127830)  
   Why-now: Δ+3.5, recent news 2026 Apr 2026, TOP PROSPECTS (CtrlS4 facility-presence: 18  
  
   TAG play: India partnership  
   Evidence: TOP PROSPECTS (CtrlS | T3 | play=Watch | score=39.3), OSINT (CtrlS Datacenters Ltd | score=39.3 | geo=India | why=recent news 2026-04-06), OSINT (CtrlS Datacenters Ltd: 18 job-postings/facility-presence)  

4. NTT India Private Limited (India; CIN U72200MH1994PTC083713)  
   Why-now: Δ+5.3, 3 new signals (≤7d), active India operator  
   Cross-signal: Strong momentum in India (Compute/Power/Colo layers) with recent signal surge → partnership opening for TAG to scale operations  
   TAG play: India partnership  
   Evidence: TOP MOVERS (NTT | Δ+5.3 | 3 new signals), TOP PROSPECTS (NTT | T3 | play=Watch | score=35.4), INDIA ENTITIES (NTT INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED | U72200MH1994PTC083713)  

5. Sify Technologies Limited (India; CIN U72200TN1995PLC050809)  
   Why-now: 1 new signal (≤7d), top momentum (score 9.29), India entity active  
   Cross-signal: Highest-scoring India operator with recent filing activity → TAG can deepen partnership via government-affairs support for expansion  
   TAG play: India partnership  
   Evidence: TOP PROSPECTS (Sify | T1 | play=India partnership | score=77.5 | geo=India | why=1 new signals ≤7d), INDIA ENTITIES (SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED | U72200TN1995PLC050809)

— Grounding set (companies in sheet): ADANICONNEX PRIVATE LIMITED, AdaniConneX, CtrlS, GOOGLE INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, Gulf Data Hub, Khazna, NTT, NTT INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, NXTRA DATA LIMITED, Nxtra, ORACLE INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, Ooredoo, PRINCETON DIGITAL INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, RELIANCE LIMITED, SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED, Sify, TATA COMMUNICATIONS LIMITED, WEB WERKS INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, YOTTA TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED, Yotta, center3
